This example is in excellent, unpolished condition with a pristine “Mk 3” dial . #32 - The Cartier Paris Tank Louis 78086 18k Solid Gold The History— The Example The Cartier Tank Louis is one of the defining wristwatch designs of the last century. First introduced in 1922 as a refinement of the original Tank, the Tank Louis established the elegant proportions that have come to define Cartier, and has been worn by artists, royalty and cultural icons ever since. This reference, the 78086 , is one of the most desirable vintage iterations. Crafted in 18k solid yellow gold , it features the highly sought-after Paris-signed dial , a detail that collectors have long admired for its rarity and historical significance. This particular watch is presented in excellent, unpolished condition , retaining crisp case lines and a pristine Mk 3 dial . The beautifully balanced proportions make it equally elegant on both men and women, wearing with the understated sophistication that has made the Tank Louis such an enduring classic. A refined and increasingly collectible Cartier – timeless in design, beautifully preserved, and one of the finest expressions of the Tank Louis lineage.
